# Metal Shark — Aluminum Fabrication
Last updated: 2026-03-25

## Status: SPECIALTY — Lightweight / Offshore / Edge Variants

## Overview
- World-class CNC machining, welding, and design
- Aluminum specialist (not steel)
- Defense and commercial contracts
- Louisiana-based manufacturer

## Contact
- Website: metalsharkboats.com
- Location: Jeanerette, LA (30 miles from Lafayette)

## Why Metal Shark for ADC
- Aluminum = lighter weight for offshore / wetland deployments
- 30 miles from Lafayette HQ
- Right vendor for edge variants that need weight reduction (rigs, pilings, vessels)

## Use Case
Not for standard ADC 3K pods. Target: offshore rig deployments, Atchafalaya wetland piling installs, vessel-mounted edge nodes.

## Next Step
Evaluate for offshore/wetland pod variant once standard pod design is locked
